title: Brodiaea nivalis
taxonomy: Brodiaea nivalis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. More specifically, it belongs to the genus Brodiaea. The genus Brodiaea is further grouped into the subfamily Brodiaeoideae. This subfamily is a part of the superfamily Asparagales, which comprises a large number of flowering plant families. Brodiaea nivalis is native to North America, specifically the western regions of the continent.

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with potential health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may aid in wound healing and the treatment of infections.
